prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-3WICK-CANDLE-WHT-FBA Product Type: CANDLE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 36 Hour Camping Survival Emergency Light Wax Candle Fire Starter in Portable Tin Box, 3 Wick Description: Winter Storm season is coming, never be stuck sitting in the dark again.

With this slow burning 36 hour candle, you control how fast it burns. Each wick will burn for 12 hours if you burn all three at once you will have 12 hours of light, burn 2 wicks at once for 24 hours of light and burn each wick individually you will have 36 hours of light.

Since the candle in made out of palm and soy wax you do not need to worry about chemical fumes burning off from the candle. With a compact design (2-3/8 by 3-1/8 inches)it fits cleverly into small spaces.

This candle is a must for all campers, hikers, hunters, and anyone who may experience a power outage. You'll want to buy this product before you end up in the dark. Search Terms: power outage storm survival stay warm emergency shelter safety blanket cold winter nights fire starter candles no lights 3 wick hurricane storm safety Features: - INSTANT EMERGENCY LIGHT: Whether you're hiking, camping or backpacking into the great outdoors, putting together an earthquake survival kit or struck with a blackout power outage at home, the ASR Outdoor 36 hour survival emergency light wax candle provides indoor or outdoor lighting to keep you and your family safe - 36 HOUR BURN TIME: The candle's four wick sections each have 12 hours of burn time; They can be burned all together or one at a time, providing a total 48 hours of light, using soy and regular wax; Batteries in flashlights and lanterns are expensive and can fail, while the survival candle offers a dependable indoor outdoor lighting source in any situation and can be used as a candle warmer too - COMPACT LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE: The 3-wick wax candle is poured in a durable tin box with lid to keep the candle in good condition; the emergency light candle fits in the palm of your hand, making it easy to pack in a bug out bag, with your camping gear or in a trekking backpack; a must-have item in any survival kit! - SURVIVAL FIRE STARTER: If you have matches on hand, this 3-wick wax candle may come in handy as a fire starter if igniting your kindling is proving troublesome; with 36 hours of burning time, getting a roaring fire started at your campsite or emergency fire in the wilderness - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 2.5 x 2.5 x 2.75 inches; Surface Material: Soy wax; Main Material: Plain wax; Wax Weight: 5oz; Color: Silver, White; Total Burn Time: 36 hours; Candle is unscented === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-Wick 36 Hour Emergency Survival Candle White

anthropic.title_differentiation: 36 Hour Burn Time, Portable Tin, Soy And Wax Blend, Fire Starter, Power Outage Light, Camping And Hiking

openai.title_differentiation: 36 Hour Burn Time, Tin Box, Soy And Palm Wax, Unscented, Portable Fire Starter, Compact Bug Out Bag Size
